name: Mix'n'match Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Instant beef or chicken bouillon granules
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the selected ground meat and instant bouillon granules.
2. Gradually add water to the mixture until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Mix gently with your hands until the meat is evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
4. Form the mixture into equal-sized meatballs.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Cook the meatballs for about 15-20 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are browned on all sides and cooked through.
7. Remove from heat and let cool before serving or using in your desired recipe.
